articles.title: TAME THE CAMPAIGN MAYHEM
articles.summary: Every quarter, the same story: more campaigns, tighter timelines, same team. How do you make it work? With human + AI collaboration, you can.

articles.title: 85% OF FORTUNE 100 COMPANIES USE ASANA. Try for free →
2026 MUSIC MARKETING TRENDS: WORLD-BUILDING, MYSTERY CAMPAIGNS, IRL ACTIVATIONS, AND MORE
articles.summary: Music campaigns in 2026 leaned into storytelling and experiential design. Mystery-based launches turn speculation into participation, creating momentum through secrecy and community clues. Single releases now carry full narrative arcs, using props, locations, and symbols to shape fan perception. Real-life touchpoints drive digital traction, especially when surprising or deeply personal. Revisiting past hits, visuals, or venues taps into nostalgia to boost shareability and reintroduce legacy acts to younger audiences. Cinematic formats unify content across touchpoints, making each release feel like an unfolding story with chapters, characters, and set pieces fans can return to and share.

articles.title: CRITEO STUDY: HOW TO MAXIMIZE RETAIL MEDIA IMPACT BEYOND ROAS
articles.summary: Criteo's research found that retail media delivers value beyond ROAS by driving discovery, conversion, and incremental growth that last-click metrics miss. Full funnel measurement matters because paid exposure increases organic demand and purchase intent, as shown by conversion rates that are about 2x higher for shoppers who click sponsored ads and organic search clicks rising by over 50% in the Americas. Performance improves when investment and tactics scale together, since combining display and sponsored product ads lifts revenue per user by 3.2x, and increasing spend by more than 10% correlates with positive year-over-year organic sales growth.

articles.title: YOUR NEXT LAUNCH WILL FAIL WITHOUT AN AMPLIFIER STRATEGY
articles.summary: Launching without an amplifier plan makes marketing an afterthought. Product and marketing must be built together. Design for amplifiers before buyers. These include journalists, reviewers, creators, influencers, analysts, and trusted communities. Give them reasons to talk by baking hooks into the product, story, and data. Distribution now comes from people, not posts.

articles.title: HOW I GOT $120K + 12K NEW FOLLOWERS ON LINKEDIN IN 4 MONTHS
articles.summary: A LinkedIn account went from 0 inbound leads to 10+ per week by overhauling its content strategy. Posting 5X a week, rewriting the profile multiple times, and sharing professional wins, failures, and growth stories built authority. The 3Ps strategy guided content, with Perspective posts offering insights, Proof posts showing results, and Promo posts generating leads. Each post addressed client pain points in actionable micro-lessons, while outreach and consultative calls focused on listening and adding value. Storytelling and vulnerability turned every interaction into a data point.

articles.title: 85% OF THE FORTUNE 100 KEEPS WORK ON TRACK WITH ASANA. SEE WHY
articles.summary: Marketing campaigns have a lot of moving pieces: assets, approvals, stakeholders, deadlines. Asana [9] puts it all in one place so nothing slips through the cracks. Track every campaign's status at a glance, route creative reviews to the right people automatically, and keep stakeholders updated with real-time dashboards.

articles.title: 15 AI TOOLS B2B TEAMS ACTUALLY USE
articles.summary: Scrappy B2B teams rely on AI tools ranging from widely used platforms like SurferSEO, Canva Magic Studio, and Descript to more specialized solutions. Tools like Vercel V0 build landing pages with A/B testing and smart chatbots, while Flourish creates interactive data visualizations and heat maps.

articles.title: HOW TO BUILD A BRAND SUBREDDIT: FULL SETUP GUIDE
articles.summary: Only brands with an active Reddit audience, strong moderation, and comfort with criticism should start a subreddit. If not, alternatives like joining existing subreddits or using user accounts work better. For those who qualify, define your goal, such as support, advocacy, or awareness. Then, assign a moderator, build rules, and post conversation starters. Launch quietly with core users before scaling. Keep it active with daily check-ins, recurring threads, and transparent replies to complaints. Over time, a subreddit boosts credibility, surfaces user insights, and strengthens brand visibility across platforms and search engines.

articles.title: STATE OF CONSUMER AI 2025: PRODUCT HITS, MISSES, AND WHAT'S NEXT
articles.summary: Consumer AI is trending toward a winner-take-most dynamic, with usage and spend highly concentrated around a single assistant for most users. ChatGPT leads with an estimated 800 to 900M WAUs, a 36% DAU to MAU ratio, and 50% month 12 desktop retention, while Gemini trails in scale but is growing faster at 155% YoY desktop user growth and nearly 300% YoY growth in paid subscriptions. New standalone products have mixed results, as Sora reached 12M downloads but under 8% day 30 retention, while NotebookLM doubled web users YoY and reached 8M MAUs on mobile. The biggest opportunity ahead sits outside the major labs, as focused startups continue to reach millions of users by building dedicated consumer experiences rather than general assistants.

articles.title: COCA-COLA CHRISTMAS AD CONTROVERSY: CAN AI REPLACE HUMAN CREATIVITY IN MARKETING?
articles.summary: Coca-Cola's use of AI in its Christmas ads shows how efficiency gains can clash with emotional authenticity in brand storytelling. In November 2024, it recreated the iconic Holidays Are Coming ad using AI, which was faster and cheaper but triggered backlash as viewers called it soulless, even though impressions were high. In 2025, it released another AI holiday ad using animals and archival Santa imagery, signaling it would continue despite criticism. The move suggests it is testing how much emotional distance consumers will tolerate, especially during Christmas, while relying on deep brand loyalty to limit real sales impact.
